caption: A news segment from Plus TV Africa features alternating shots of two men. One man wears a red patterned cap and a grey garment with red floral accents, while the other wears a blue traditional cap and matching blue attire. The man in blue is seen gesturing with his hand raised. The setting appears to be an outdoor or semi-outdoor area with greenery in the background. A logo for Plus TV Africa is visible in the top left corners. A purple banner across the bottom reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Additional text at the bottom of the screen fluctuates between "WATCH ON", "WATCH ONLINE", "SUBSCRIBE", and the web address "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV". The video alternates between close-up shots of the two men as they appear to be speaking.
